name: New York
aiCoverage: Explicit for deceased performers (§ 50-f); limited for living
summary: New York's statute was expanded in 2020 to cover post-mortem "digital replicas" of deceased performers and to criminalize non-consensual sexually explicit deepfakes. Protections for living subjects still run primarily through the older §§ 50–51 framework.

keyLegislation.title: N.Y. Civ. Rights Law §§ 50–51 (right of privacy)
N.Y. Civ. Rights Law § 50-f (post-mortem digital replicas, 2020)
N.Y. Penal Law § 245.15 (non-consensual sexually explicit deepfakes)

notableCases.title: TBD — New York AI likeness enforcement to be added.
